meaning: n.(由黄麻制的做麻袋等用的)粗麻布
examples: The mall was like a burlap bag to me. I didn't want to be in it.
Floral cloth from flour sacks replaced the burlap-bag curtains covering the grimy window.
I have all but the straps done on another one for her just because. And I made myself this burlap one as well.
She likes throwing a burlap cloth over a table, and adding a self-lit mirror paired with antique crystal lamps and a small-scale, American Federal chair.
Their bodies were all found in December, wrapped in burlap cloth.
